channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: DHS funding bill moves to House after early morning passage in Senate - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. DHS funding bill moves to House after early morning passage in Senate  The Washington Post

  3. TSA funding update: Senate advances DHS bill, tees up House vote to end government shutdown  CNBC
  4. Senate Votes to Fund Most of D.H.S. in Bid to End Partial Shutdown  The New York Times
  5. Senate agrees to end shutdown for most of DHS  Politico
